subagents_consumed_and_closed.result: Recommended same-source evidence/provenance guarded route/corridor claim status inference for delivered, planned, and proposed claims.
Recommended exact current/executed entity-to-entity funding-award delivered inference for transfers, payments, agreements, and contracted-by/with rows.
Recommended dated event/entity organizer and participant status inference plus formal entity/entity partnership artifact delivered inference.

implemented_changes.summary: Classified non-source has_claim relations as delivered/planned/proposed only when relation and claim share current-source evidence and route/corridor text proves the lifecycle.
guards: claim must include and evidence the relation source_id
relation must evidence its own source_id
delivered limited to route/corridor factual signals and rejects future/proposal/agenda/repair text
planned/proposed limited to route subjects and explicit will/proposed/would route-service patterns
entity subjects, provenance mismatches, mixed active/future claims, no-proposed/no-action text, and missing evidence remain held

implemented_changes.summary: Marked exact executed/current entity-to-entity funding-award relations delivered for transfers, payments, entered agreements, contracted-with, and contracted-by rows.
guards: subject/object must both be distinct entities
relation kind must be one of transfers_funds_to, makes_payment_to, entered_agreement_with, contracted_with, contracted_by
source titles are positive-only for agreements-entered-into wording so month names do not trip modal guards

implemented_changes.summary: Classified dated event/entity organizer and participant roles as delivered or planned, and formal entity/entity MOU/agreement/task-force artifacts as delivered.
guards: organized_by/has_participant requires exactly one dated event endpoint and one entity endpoint
event family must be public_engagement, implementation, approval, milestone, incident, governance, or publication
work-plan sources and future event dates classify as planned rather than delivered
completed organizer/participant verbs required for delivered event roles
has_partner/collaborates_with entity pairs require executed MOU/agreement/task-force artifact phrases
generic working-together/collaboration text, missing dates, wrong event families, and wrong endpoint shapes remain held

verification.result: pass: Materialized 93092/98102 submissions; retired submissions skipped 243; SQLite FTS quick_check ok
pass: Issues 0; submissions 98102; canonical records 84040; wiki pages 7334

remaining.next_action: Continue with metric has_metric only if an actual/planned/proposed discriminator is available; otherwise audit remaining claim, timeline, corridor, treatment, and agency-role tails for smaller high-confidence deterministic slices.
